svg.title: Kafka replication: leader and ISR follower brokers
svg.desc: Partition 0's leader lives on Broker 1, with followers on Broker 2 and Broker 3. ISR set shown. Producers write to leader; followers replicate.
svg.text: Replication factor = 3 · Each partition has 1 leader + 2 followers · ISR = followers caught up within replica.lag.time.max.ms
